! Title: LockedIn YouTube — Maximalist Distraction Filter
! Description: Strips YouTube to a focus-only surface: home feed, Shorts, watch-page recommendations, thumbnails, comments, player end screens, engagement metrics (likes, views, subscriber count), and guide/navigation clutter. Derived from the LockedIn-YT extension. Works in uBlock Origin (desktop) and AdGuard for iOS.
! Homepage: https://github.com/dlithio/yt-all-distract-list
! Source extension: https://github.com/KartikHalkunde/LockedIn-YT (MIT, © Kartik Halkunde)
! Expires: 1 day
! Version: 2026.06.06
! License: MIT
!
youtube.com###mouseover-overlay
youtube.com###primary > .ytd-two-column-search-results-renderer ytd-horizontal-card-list-renderer
youtube.com###primary > .ytd-two-column-search-results-renderer ytd-shelf-renderer
youtube.com###related
youtube.com###related yt-chip-cloud-renderer

youtube.com###related ytd-compact-radio-renderer
youtube.com###related ytd-compact-video-renderer
youtube.com###related ytd-compact-video-renderer:has([href^="/shorts/"])
youtube.com###related ytd-feed-filter-chip-bar-renderer
youtube.com###related ytd-item-section-renderer > #contents
